out_of_scope_note: Pure-ML / HCI paper on human-simulatability of decision-set models for interpretable machine learning. No biological neural content, no perceptual/decision-making computational claim about the brain — the human-subject experiments measure crowdworker performance on logic-based model classification, not neural computation. Out of scope per prompt category 'Pure-ML papers ... without biological neural content' and 'HCI ... without neural data or theoretical model of cognition'.
